13:T673,<span></span>
<span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text)">- </span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text); font-weight: bold">**</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-constant); text-decoration: underline">[</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword); text-decoration: underline">Installation</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-constant); text-decoration: underline">]</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-link); text-decoration: underline">(/installation)</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text); font-weight: bold">**</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text)"> – Composer or monorepo. Add the </span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-string)">`docit`</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text)"> script and run </span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-string)">`composer docit`</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text)">.</span></span>
<span></span>
<span></span>
<span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text)">- </span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text); font-weight: bold">**</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-constant); text-decoration: underline">[</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-keyword); text-decoration: underline">Quick Start</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-constant); text-decoration: underline">]</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-token-link); text-decoration: underline">(/quick-start)</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text); font-weight: bold">**</span><span style="color: var(--shiki-color-text)"> – Build, configure output dir, and deploy.</span></span>
<span></span>
